body:

name: Lindsey Kolb, Team Greitens
subject: Welcome to Team Greitens
body:
Dear Willis,

Welcome to Team Greitens! We’re excited to have you join our ranks.

With the help of supporters just like you, Eric will become our party’s gubernatorial nominee, win in November, and lead our state forward. Here are five ways to continue your support of Team Greitens:

1\. Attend a Listen and Lead Tour Event. Check out the schedule [here](http://ericgreitens.com/listen-lead-tour/)

2\. RSVP to attend a staff-led [volunteer training session](http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer-training/)

3\. [Chip in](http://greitensformissouri.com/donate/) to support the campaign by making a financial contribution

4\. Recruit friends and family to join our ranks by sending them [this link](http://greitensformissouri.com/)

5\. Follow Eric on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/EricGreitens) and [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens?fref=ts)

We are excited to have you join our team. We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail.

Thank you for your support!

Lindsey Kolb
Volunteer Coordinator
Greitens for Missouri

name: Tom Wolf
subject: My Friend Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend -- I'm endorsing Katie McGinty to be our next U.S. Senator because I know she'll be an incredible advocate for Pennsylvanians all across our commonwealth. Katie was one of my opponents during the primary, and I asked her to join my administration because she demonstrated that she's in politics for the right reasons. She is a 'can do' person who doesn't just talk about it, but one who works to get things done. I know she's the Senator we need in Washington, D.C. because she shares the values of hard working Pennsylvanians and I know she will be able to deliver for them. [**I 'm in for Katie, but she's going to need folks like you standing with her, too -- will you chip in $5 or more to her campaign before Wednesday's FEC deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5868699487131664384/-7496503263525601280?refcode=e20150928u&amount=5) Since taking office, we've made a lot of progress in our effort to create jobs that pay, schools that teach, and government that works. With Katie playing a vital role, we sent a budget to the Legislature that makes a historic investment in education and cuts property taxes for middle class families and seniors. Katie also led the charge for me in ensuring my Administration worked with Washington to save the Children's Health Insurance Program. Katie also drove forward and made sure we were on track to expand Medicaid to 600,000 Pennsylvanians. [**It 's my honor to support Katie in her U.S. Senate campaign, and with all of us working together, we'll send her to Washington -- chip in $5 or more before Wednesday's deadline.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5868699487131664384/-7496503263525601280?refcode=e20150928u&amount=5) We need Katie to fight for Pennsylvania in the Senate, and we need to fight for her right now. Thank you, Tom Wolf

name: George P. Bush
subject: As real as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend,

You already heard from Mom and Dad, but now I'm personally reaching out because we're two days away from the biggest deadline of this campaign and we're still $126,724 short of our goal.

**Hillary outraised us last quarter, so we need 7,500 grassroots supporters to step up in the next 48 hours to help us fight back.**

[**We need you to chip in $100, $50, $25 or even $5 right now before Wednesday at midnight.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/olfgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnptqrlm_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This deadline isn't a ploy, it's as real as it gets. We have to publicly say how much money we raise in the next 48 hours, so missing this goal is NOT an option.

body:

name: Josh Wolf
subject: Ted Cruz is ECSTATIC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

The Tea Party is ecstatic that Speaker John Boehner is resigning from Congress. Senator Ted Cruz, a Tea Party leader, was at one of their get-togethers -- a victory party, really -- this weekend. He said: _**" Yesterday, John Boehner was speaker of the House. Y'all come to town and somehow that changes. My only request is: Can you come more often?"**_ Cruz and his allies know what Boehner's resignation means: **He 's not in their way anymore.** It clears the way for their radical, out-of-touch agenda to make its way through Washington.

**We cannot -- CANNOT -- leave the Senate in Republican control.** It is absolutely critical Democrats take back control in 2016. _And electing Patrick is essential to making that happen._

[**Forty-eight hours from now, the FEC quarter will end -- and we need to reach $50,000 before then. Make a contribution right now to get us there.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20a8/738133e4/3abe1468/7f8c95b9/3008704969/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150928?refcode=pme150928_m&recurring=true")

The Tea Party thinks Washington is theirs for the taking. If they take over the House and keep the Senate, they have a straight line to pass whatever they want.

It's an idea that should make Florida families cringe. These are the people that want to deny women access to reproductive care. They want to end Medicare as we know it.

How can we prevent that agenda from becoming law? _**Take back control of the Senate.**_ We know that winning our race in Florida is a big part of that goal. We know that Patrick has the best shot to win.

And we know what we can do to make that happen -- **hit this $50,000 FEC goal.**

[**We 're running out of time fast in this month. Give what you can -- right now -- to get us there.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20a8/738133e4/3abe1468/7f8c95b9/3008704969/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150928?refcode=pme150928_m&recurring=true")

With your support month over month, we can and will put Patrick in the Senate.

Thanks for your help.

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20a8/738133e4/3abe1468/7f8c95ba/3008704969/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: "I've never contributed"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Friend -
In just three days, we'll close the books on a critical FEC fundraising deadline. And when we do, we'll have the chance to accomplish something absolutely unprecedented:
**We have a chance to announce that our supporters have made 1 million online contributions faster than any presidential campaign in history.**
But there's one contribution missing -- the one that will ensure we reach our goal:
Yours.
[**Make your first online contribution to our campaign today -- $25.10 is the average contribution we've received this past week -- and help us become the fastest campaign to reach 1 million contributions in presidential election history.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22fe/43f17890/59e29b84/621c0b44/1705859297/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150928nd-wk")
Our political revolution is powered by working class Americans volunteering their time and making small-dollar contributions to fight back against the billionaire-backed Super PACs already attacking our campaign.
People like Emily from Virginia who wrote, _"I registered to vote just to vote for Bernie. I'm 27 years old and have never felt so inspired and so strongly about any other candidate. I want Bernie to win. I may not have a lot of money but I want to join the great group of people who are coming together, donating whatever they can -- time and money -- to support Bernie."_
And Jessica from West Virginia who said, _"I 've never contributed to anyone's campaign before and had dropped out of participating in the political process entirely. As a woman who is also a disabled veteran I didn't feel like anyone was listening or even cared. You give me hope and that is why I contribute."_
Or Amanda from Nevada, _"I 've never donated to a political campaign, or even considered it really. When I saw how much small donations make a difference, and started to learn more about Bernie, I got choked up. I'm hoping that my small contribution will help make this world a better place. I trust you Bernie!"_
[**Join Emily, Jessica, and Amanda and make your first online contribution to our campaign today -- $25.10 is the average contribution we've received this past week -- and help us become the fastest campaign to reach 1 million contributions in presidential election history.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22fe/43f17890/59e29b84/621c0b44/1705859297/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150928nd-wk")
If we stand together, I know we'll accomplish our goal and send an unmistakable message to the political media that the American people have said ENOUGH is ENOUGH! This country should work for everyone, not just a handful of billionaires.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Enough is enough.

President Obama thinks he can bully everyone around him and force his will on the rest of the country on ObamaCare, Planned Parenthood and more out-of-control spending.

Far too many of my colleagues would rather shrug and surrender to Obama's demands before the fight even begins -- instead of standing up and fighting back against his Big Government policies that are ripping this country apart.

We're told the worst thing that could happen is a government shutdown.

But Fellow Conservative, I'm voting against the short-term spending bill designed to keep government open past the Wednesday deadline because I think the worst thing that could happen is if the Big Government gravy train keeps chugging along.

**[With the FEC's End of Quarter deadline rapidly approaching in just over 48 hours, can I count on you to stand with me during this critical time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30673032:sHsb-zmWN:m:1:879035888:FC0CDEA2E839766A1B99F9F3AB378EAB:r)**?

The American people aren't going to take it anymore, Fellow Conservative.

I'm sure you've heard every excuse imaginable that some of my colleagues use to justify waving the white flag and avoiding a confrontation with Obama.

"We'll defund Obama's Big Government policies once Republicans have the White House."

"Obama will blame us if the government shuts down."

"We just don't have the votes to override Obama's veto."

The American people didn't vote for a Republican party who will surrender at every turn in 2014. And they won't vote for one if our party continues along this path in 2016, either.

I'm not falling for their excuses, Fellow Conservative. I won't run and hide.

I'm confident if I stand and fight, the American people will stand with me.

That's why, with the End of Quarter reporting deadline just over 48 hours away, **[I'm counting on you to make your most generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30673032:sHsb-zmWN:m:1:879035888:FC0CDEA2E839766A1B99F9F3AB378EAB:r)** to help me show the liberal press and Big Government apologists that the American people desperately want a President who will fight to slash Big Government.

I believe our Republican party should simply require 60 votes for all spending. Democrats don't have the votes to continue their radical pet projects.

Just let Obama try to blame Republicans for a government shutdown under these circumstances!

It's plans like these that have the Big Government establishment up in arms.

While other candidates tout new tax plans, not one has dared to issue a plan as bold as my 14.5% flat tax, which is designed to effectively end the IRS and put the Washington Machine on a diet.

If passed, it would return $2 trillion to the American people over 10 years, end the loopholes which are so often exploited by insiders with fat-cat lobbyists and create at least 1.4 million new jobs!

The Washington Machine is scared stiff.

They know I'm a fighter. They know I will never back down.

But today, I'm asking you to stand with me.

**[The End of Quarter deadline is this Wednesday, so please make your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30673032:sHsb-zmWN:m:1:879035888:FC0CDEA2E839766A1B99F9F3AB378EAB:r)**.

My campaign is built for the long haul, Fellow Conservative. My recent victory in the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference straw poll proves that our organization and grassroots force is unmatched.

But even grassroots-driven campaigns require money. There are offices, staff, phone banks, yard signs, materials, campaign travel, and many other expenses necessary for a campaign to function.

**[So please help me fight for Liberty and constitutional government by making a generous contribution to my campaign today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30673032:sHsb-zmWN:m:1:879035888:FC0CDEA2E839766A1B99F9F3AB378EAB:r)**.

The deadline is rapidly approaching. There's no time to waste!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30673033:sHsb-zmWN:m:1:879035888:FC0CDEA2E839766A1B99F9F3AB378EAB:r)

body:
---
Friend --

This email from Governor Wolf is one of the best things I've seen this week -- I wanted to be sure you didn't miss it.

The Governor is right -- Katie is exactly the best person to oust Pat Toomey and bring real change for Pennsylvania families.

[**Chip in $10 or whatever you can today to stand with Governor Wolf and support Katie 's campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3719738997447065600/-2379851136879296512?refcode=e20150928u.2&amount=15)

**With Katie 's first FEC filing deadline in just two days, your support couldn't come at a better time.**

Thanks -- and seriously, check out Governor Wolf's email if you haven't already.

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

_\---- Original message ----
From: Tom Wolf
Subject: My Friend Katie_

Friend --

I'm endorsing Katie McGinty to be our next U.S. Senator because I know she'll be an incredible advocate for Pennsylvanians all across our commonwealth.

Katie was one of my opponents during the primary, and I asked her to join my administration because she demonstrated that she's in politics for the right reasons.

She is a 'can do' person who doesn't just talk about it, but one who works to get things done. I know she's the Senator we need in Washington, D.C. because she shares the values of hard working Pennsylvanians and I know she will be able to deliver for them.

**[I'm in for Katie, but she's going to need folks like you standing with her, too -- will you chip in $5 or more to her campaign before Wednesday's FEC deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3719738997447065600/-2379851136879296512?refcode=e20150928u.2&amount=15)**

Since taking office, we've made a lot of progress in our effort to create jobs that pay, schools that teach, and government that works.

With Katie playing a vital role, we sent a budget to the Legislature that makes a historic investment in education and cuts property taxes for middle class families and seniors. Katie also led the charge for me in ensuring my Administration worked with Washington to save the Children's Health Insurance Program. Katie also drove forward and made sure we were on track to expand Medicaid to 600,000 Pennsylvanians.

**[It's my honor to support Katie in her U.S. Senate campaign, and with all of us working together, we'll send her to Washington -- chip in $5 or more before Wednesday's deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3719738997447065600/-2379851136879296512?refcode=e20150928u.2&amount=15)**

We need Katie to fight for Pennsylvania in the Senate, and we need to fight for her right now.

Thank you,

Tom Wolf
